segments.text: The theory of relativity, proposed by Albert Einstein in the early 20th century, fundamentally changed our understanding of
ysics. It introduced concepts such as space-time and the
elativity of simultaneity. One key aspect of this theory is that mass and energy are interchangeable, as articulated in the famous equation
=mc². This principle has far-reaching implications, influencing both theoretical and applied physics, including areas such as
uclear energy. Additionally, the theory has been experimentally validated through numerous tests, such as the observation of
ravity waves, further solidifying its position as a cornerstone of modern physics.

academic.passage: The theory of relativity, developed by Albert Einstein, revolutionized physics by introducing the concepts of space-time and the interchangeability of mass and energy. It showed that time is not absolute and can vary depending on the observer's relative motion. This theory has significant implications in various fields, including astrophysics and cosmology. The famous equation E=mc² encapsulates the relationship between mass and energy, allowing scientists to understand phenomena such as nuclear reactions. Overall, relativity has reshaped our understanding of the universe.

questions.q: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: The theory of relativity has transformed physics.
Nuclear reactions are explained by relativity.
Space-time is a new concept in physics.
questions.explain: 這段文字的主要思想是相對論如何改變物理學的理解。

questions.q: Which equation is famously associated with the theory of relativity?
questions.explain: E=mc² 是與相對論關聯的著名方程式。

questions.q: What inference can be made about the impact of relativity on modern science?
options: It is irrelevant to contemporary physics.
It continues to influence various scientific fields.
It is only important for theoretical physics.
It has been completely replaced by new theories.
questions.explain: 相對論的影響仍然存在於許多科學領域，顯示它的持久性。

questions.q: What does the term 'space-time' refer to in the context of relativity?
options: The combination of space and time as a single continuum.
questions.explain: 在相對論中，'空間-時間'是將空間和時間視為一個整體的概念。

daily.passage: Attention students: The library will be closed for renovations from March 1 to March 15. Please plan accordingly and return all borrowed materials before this date. We appreciate your understanding during this time.

questions.q: When will the library be closed?
questions.explain: 圖書館將在三月一日至三月十五日關閉。

questions.q: What should students do before the library closes?
questions.explain: 學生應在圖書館關閉之前歸還所有借用的材料。
